tests.name: doctor reach
tests.evidence: OK API: reachable, OK Auth: configured against the test store

tests.name: orders list (basic)
tests.evidence: returned 5 orders with full GraphQL response

tests.name: bug #4 patch (orders list --query filtering)
tests.evidence: --query 'created_at:>2026-05-01' --first 5 returned only 2026-05 orders (#131057A, #131057B, etc) vs unfiltered returning oldest 2018 orders

tests.name: bug #1 patch (shopifyql funnel real columns)
tests.evidence: shopifyql funnel --days 7 returned 21634 sessions, 200 checkouts, 174 orders against the test store

tests.name: novel: report revenue-daily --days 3
tests.evidence: returned 3 days of revenue data, e.g. 2026-05-24 gross 10546.93 SGD across 8 orders

tests.name: sync products --since 7d (bug #2/#3 patches)
tests.evidence: ran end-to-end, products/customers/orders/abandoned-checkouts all synced; fulfillment-orders failed due to token scope (known operator config)
